note: Graccioza wordmark is a monochrome black serif logotype (official Sorema/Graccioza brand vector). The source wiki SVG carried a nested <g transform> with off-canvas absolute coordinates that Three.js SVGLoader cannot resolve, so it was rendered to a high-res PNG and re-traced to a flat single-path SVG (graccioza-trace.mjs) before extrusion. On the dark-green hero bg the black reads dark-on-dark, so the 3D hero logo is rendered in cream #F2EDE4 (data-material=metal data-color=#F2EDE4) per the Avantopool/Weltevree/Ajax dark-logo precedent — Villa Sjövik logo always gold. Mocha accent #A47864 available as alternate brand tint if wanted later.
